title: bolanthus hirsutus var. barradensis
intro: Bolanthus hirsutus var. barradensis, also known as Barradale woolly St John's wort, is a flowering plant species within the St John's wort family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Bolanthus hirsutus var. barradensis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and provide antimicrobial protection. Bolanthus hirsutus var. barradensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical application, offering a natural remedy for various skin issues.
